NB US-101 TO NB I-405, THE #1 LANE IS CLOSED. NB US-101 TO SB I-405 IS CLOSED. THE CLOSURE WILL REMAIN IN EFFECT UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE DUE TO A TRAFFIC COLLISION. REF LOG: 0141 "
